# Getting Support
If you are having an issue using the **Shadow of the Weird Wizard** system, you might want to do one or more of the following suggestions.
## Check Documentations
### Cursor Hover Tooltips
The system was designed to be as straightforward as possible. Hovering your cursor above an element usually displays a tooltip explaining what it is or how to interact with it.

As you'll find many within the app, it's good practice to always hover over elements to see if there is some useful information!
### The Question Mark Button
Many apps (windows), like sheets, have a question mark button on the top right of the window. If you see one of them, click it and useful information about it should be shown.
### System Documentation
Within Foundry VTT, check the Compendium tab and look for **System Documentation** under the Shadow of the Weird Wizard folder. There, you can find a lot of useful documentation about how to use things in the system, especially those that are not as straightforward.
## Use our Discord
If you don't find the tips above enough and you want to ask questions and get help (or just hang out!), we recommend to join our Discord server: [Weird Wizard for Foundry](https://discord.gg/X5XustKpe4).

There you can find people that might help you with your problem, as well as people interested in the project, like you!
